hero.title: Prepare for UNT. Enter the best universities.
hero.subtitle: Abyroi is a private preparatory school in Uralsk, Kazakhstan. We prepare students for the Unified National Test with guaranteed results.

about_snippet.title: About Abyroi School
about_snippet.text: Abyroi is a modern educational center in Uralsk specializing in preparation for the Unified National Test. Our mission is to help every student unlock their potential and enter the best universities in the country. We use an individual approach, experienced teachers, and modern teaching methods.

values.title: Our Values
values.academic_desc: Deep knowledge and systematic approach to learning
values.individual_desc: Each student receives a learning plan tailored to their needs
values.safe_desc: A comfortable atmosphere for effective learning
values.result_desc: Focus on real achievements and high UNT scores

programs_page.title: Academic Programs
programs_page.subtitle: Choose your UNT preparation track — in Kazakh or Russian

admissions_page.title: How to Enroll at Abyroi
admissions_page.faq1_a: Students in grades 9, 10, or 11 can apply. We accept students from both Kazakh and Russian language schools.
admissions_page.faq2_q: What does the entrance exam include?
admissions_page.faq2_a: The entrance exam includes basic math tasks (for the science-math track) or history and language tasks (for the humanities track). Duration: 1.5 hours.
admissions_page.faq3_a: Tuition depends on the chosen track and payment period. Contact us for current pricing information.
admissions_page.faq4_a: Yes, we offer discounts for high-achieving students and children from large families. Contact our managers for details.
admissions_page.faq5_q: Is the program online or in-person?
admissions_page.faq5_a: The main format is in-person at our learning center in Uralsk. Online format may be arranged in exceptional cases.
admissions_page.faq6_q: How do I find out my entrance exam results?
admissions_page.faq6_a: Results are communicated within 3-5 business days by phone or email. You can also track status through your personal account on the website.
admissions_page.subtitle: A simple and transparent enrollment process from application to first class
admissions_page.who_desc: Students in {grade} can enroll in UNT preparation
admissions_page.tuition_text: Contact us to find out the cost. We will find the best payment plan for your family.
